description_long: This radiator features a tall, narrow, and angular design, with two flat white panels meeting at a right angle to form a corner-fitting structure. At the intersection of these panels, a vertical blue metallic heating element is mounted, consisting of several parallel tubes or fins for efficient heat dissipation. The radiator's minimalist construction suggests it is designed for unobtrusive installation in tight or corner spaces, such as urban hallways or utility rooms. The blue heating element is visually distinct against the white panels, and the overall form is sleek and modern. No visible controls or valves are present on the exterior, and the back and sides are plain, emphasizing its intended placement against walls. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the heating element and painted metal or composite for the panels.
description: A tall, corner-mounted radiator with white panels and a vertical blue metallic heating element, designed for modern urban interiors. The structure is sleek and minimal, with no visible controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue vertical heating element mounted at the intersection of two white panels forming a right angle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the white panels and the depth of the radiator, with the blue element barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned white panels meeting at a corner, with no visible heating element.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and the edge of the panels.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at the bottom center of the blue heating element, vertically oriented
